title: 20:07 â March 16, 2020
body_text:
20:07 â March 16, 2020
FX Notes Plus â New Feature for Foreign Cheque Returns
FX Notes Plus has a new feature where foreign cheque return reports now show details and images of returned foreign items. We updated the Payment Solutions Manual to reflect this change.
In addition, we updated the shipping procedures to indicate that financial institutions only need to contact Exchange Bank of Canada (EBC) for special shipping instructions if a single transaction consists of $10,000 or more CAD equivalent. Previously, the amount was $5,000 CAD equivalent when financial institutions were required to contact EBC.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus
Section 1.4, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We changed the amount from $5,000 to $10,000 (CAD equivalent or more) to indicate when the financial institution is required to contact EBC for specific shipping instructions.
Section 13.1, Overview of Shipping Foreign Currency or AMEX Travelers Cheques
Same as above.
Section 15.4, Viewing Foreign Cheque Reports
We added procedures on how to view notes and attachments of returned foreign items or reference documents for a transaction.
